zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Salisbury於1088年出生在法國時，她的父親Edward of Salisbury28歲，母親First Wife19歲。她於大約1105年與Humphrey de Bohun I在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1146年在英國格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Salisbury于1088年出生在法国时，她的父亲Edward of Salisbury28岁，母亲First Wife19岁。她于大约1105年与Humphrey de Bohun I在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1146年在英国格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Salisbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name primarily from Salesbury in Blackburn (Lancashire) but also occasionally from Salisbury (Wiltshire). The Lancashire placename derives from Old English salh ‘willow, sallow’ + burg ‘fortress’, while the Wiltshire placename arises from a shortened form of the Celtic placename Sorviodunum (from an unknown initial element + Celtic dūno- ‘fort’). In the Old English period the second element was dropped and Sorvio- (of unexplained etymology) became Searo- in Old English as the result of folk etymological association the Old English word searu ‘trick’; to this an explanatory burh ‘fortress, manor, town’ was added. The city is recorded in the Domesday Book as Sarisberie; the change of -r- to -l- is the result of later dissimilation.

variants.name: Salsbury
meanings: Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of Salomon or some other Jewish name beginning with Sa-.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Salisbury was born in 1088, in France, her father, Edward of Salisbury, was 28 and her mother, First Wife, was 19. She married Humphrey de Bohun I about 1105, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1146, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Salisbury est née en 1088, à France, son père, Edward of Salisbury, avait 28 ans et sa mère, First Wife, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Humphrey de Bohun I environ 1105, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1146, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Salisbury 1088 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward of Salisbury 28 und ihre Mutter First Wife 19. Sie hat um 1105 in Normandie, Frankreich Humphrey de Bohun I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1146 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Salisbury è nata il nel 1088 nel Francia, sua padre, Edward of Salisbury, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, First Wife, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Humphrey de Bohun I circa 1105, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1146, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Salisburyが1088年にフランスで生まれた時，父Edward of Salisburyは28歳，母First Wifeは19歳であった。約1105年にフランスノーマンディでHumphrey de Bohun Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1146年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Salisbury(이)가 1088년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward of Salisbury(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 First Wife(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1105년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Humphrey de Bohun I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1146년 영국 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Salisbury nasceu em 1088, em França, seu pai, Edward of Salisbury, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, First Wife, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Humphrey de Bohun I aproximadamente 1105, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1146, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Salisbury родилась в 1088 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Edward of Salisbury было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали First Wife, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humphrey de Bohun I около 1105 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1146 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Salisbury nació en 1088, en Francia, su papá, Edward of Salisbury, tenía 28 años y su mamá, First Wife, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Humphrey de Bohun I aproximadamente 1105, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1146, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
